rationale: Both evaluations give the identical score (3/10) and rest on the same job-relevant deficiencies: no C/UNIX embedded experience, no Linux kernel modification, no MACsec/802.1X security protocol experience, and no Japanese proficiency. The wording differs only superficially (e.g., 'embedded-like environments' vs 'embedded-like projects', different example project names), which is ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant keys off the Berlin-to-Bangalore change.
